name: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a small nonstick skillet, heat 1 teaspoon Margarine until bubbly and hot.
3. Add onion and saute until translucent (Do not brown).
4. Place 3/4 cup of macaroni in the bottom of a 1-quart casserole dish.
5. Top with 3 ounces cheese, then half the sauteed onion.
6. Repeat layers.
7. In a small bowl, combine milk, egg, salt, and red pepper, mixing well.
8. Pour over the macaroni mixture and sprinkle with paprika.
9. Dot with remaining Margarine.
10. Bake until set, 20-25 minutes (Do not overcook).
